title: Advanced CSS Features Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating modern, advanced web layouts using CSS.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional, responsive component that adapts based on its PARENT container's size?
Which CSS rule is used to define the 'multi-step' movements for an animation (e.g., from 0% to 50% to 100%)?
Which of these is the long-requested 'Parent Selector' that allows you to style an element based on its children?
What is the primary role of 'Scroll Snap' in CSS?
options: To make the site load much faster.
To allow you to specify exactly where the user should 'snap' as they scroll (common in app-like sliders).
To choose the colors for the animation.
To automatically stop the animation halfway.

questions.question: The 'aspect-ratio' property in CSS allows you to ________ right in your rules.
options: Easily define the width-to-height ratio for an element (e.g., 16/9).
